evidenceRule: This focused smoke verifies Windows source-install launchers, UTF-8 setup, WSL path detection, README/INSTALL surface, support QR assets, and isolated first-run key setup without storing or printing a real key.

staticResults.detail: smoke root has package.json, Windows launchers, and DSXU product entrypoint: D:\DSXU-code-main-upload
launchers and installers derive repo root from their own location instead of hard-coded D:/DSXU paths
root install.ps1 dispatches Windows install, optional WSL, Windows Terminal policy, and no-launch smoke mode
root install.sh dispatches Unix install and points Windows Git Bash users to install.ps1
root Windows launcher delegates to repo-local PowerShell script
root Windows launcher switches code page to UTF-8
Windows launchers relaunch trusted terminals or block interactive classic-console sessions unless explicitly allowed
WSL root launcher owns distro probing, repo path conversion, native fallback, and direct inherited-console WSL launch without PowerShell stdout capture
WSL inner launcher resolves repo from its own location, forces interactive mode, and nudges startup resize so no-arg WSL launch does not fall into --print or blank initial render
PowerShell launcher owns UTF-8 setup and DSXU product entrypoint
Windows installer creates native shortcut, regenerated WSL lnk/cmd launchers, user PATH shim, Windows Terminal path, and auto-opens CLI
Windows installer overwrites stale desktop WSL .cmd with a Windows Terminal trampoline plus root-launcher delegate
WSL shortcut is optional by default and WSL launcher falls back to native DSXU when WSL is unavailable
Unix/WSL installer creates command shim and WSL desktop command when available
INSTALL.md covers bilingual install, auto-open, optional WSL, encoding, and first-run key setup
README files expose install, auto-open, first-run, desktop, and encoding guidance
README files expose the support/friend section with fixed QR asset paths
support QR image assets exist and are not empty placeholders
package.json exposes the Windows install smoke command

commandResults.stdoutTail:
[DSXU] Command shim created: C:\Users\h\AppData\Local\DSXU Code\bin\dsxu-code.cmd
[DSXU] Desktop shortcut created: C:\Users\h\Desktop\DSXU Code.lnk
[DSXU] Desktop shortcut created: C:\Users\h\Desktop\DSXU Code WSL.lnk
[DSXU] Desktop command created: C:\Users\h\Desktop\DSXU Code WSL.cmd
[DSXU] Auto-open skipped because -NoLaunch was specified.

[DSXU] Install complete.
[DSXU] Start from desktop shortcut, Start-DSXU-Code.cmd, or: dsxu-code
[DSXU] Windows default is the native DSXU Code shortcut. WSL is optional and never required for first launch.
[DSXU] Interactive Chinese/Unicode TUI requires Windows Terminal or VS Code terminal. Classic console is only allowed for non-interactive or explicit ASCII emergency sessions.
[DSXU] First launch without a key opens the DeepSeek key setup flow.
[DSXU] Optional VS Code adapter: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\install-vscode-extension.ps1
PASS: desktop WSL entrypoints regenerated

[DSXU] WSL launcher repo: D:\DSXU-code-main-upload
[DSXU] WSL is not available in this Windows session.
[DSXU] Falling back to the Windows native DSXU launcher.

[DSXU] Windows Terminal was not detected.
[DSXU] Interactive DSXU Code needs Windows Terminal or VS Code terminal for Chinese/Unicode input.
[DSXU] Classic console can turn Chinese input into '?' before DSXU receives it.
[DSXU] Run install.ps1 again or install Windows Terminal:
       winget install --id Microsoft.WindowsTerminal -e
[DSXU] For an English/ASCII emergency session only, set DSXU_ALLOW_CONHOST=1.

commandResults.stderrTail:
[DSXU] Windows Terminal was not detected.
[DSXU] Interactive DSXU Code needs Windows Terminal or VS Code terminal for Chinese/Unicode input.
[DSXU] Classic cmd/PowerShell can turn Chinese input into '?' before DSXU receives it.

[DSXU] Fix from this checkout:
  powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\install.ps1

[DSXU] Or install Windows Terminal manually:
  winget install --id Microsoft.WindowsTerminal -e

[DSXU] English/ASCII emergency mode only:
  set DSXU_ALLOW_CONHOST=1
  bun run dsxu-code
